name: Chicken Salad with Dried Cherrries
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Red or green seedless grapes, halved
1/4 cup Walnut or macadamia nuts, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the mayonnaise and yogurt in a bowl.
2. Add the cubed poached chicken to the mixture.
3. Add the halved grapes and chopped nuts.
4. Stir in the dried cherries.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Serve on a bed of lettuce.
